trans-unit.source: Move the content to the html header
It will make all the fields in the Appearance tab to be ignored when rendering the frontend
Include the media in the page gallery instead of the content
Move gallery over the text on small devices
To enable search box (it requires the extension indexed_search)
Number of navigation levels to show
Path to the the folder that contains the icons
H1, in all pages except home
Interior with left and right columns
Interior with left and right columns (only left inheriting content)
Interior with left and right columns (only right inheriting content)
Interior with left and right columns (both inheriting content)
Header to be inherited by sub-pages
Main content to be inherited by sub-pages
Footer to be inherited by sub-pages
Icon from the Font Awesome icon set
For example: fab fa-typo3, fas fa-exclamation
Show sub-pages of this page as a mega menu in the navigation bar
Container of content elements to be shown in an accordion.
Allow to have multiple items open
Buttons with different sizes and styles.
Cards with image, title, subtitle, and optional link.
Container of content elements to be shown in a carousel.
Columns (up to six) where to place any content.
Container of content elements grouped so they can share a common background and a set of classes and styles.
Animated counter from one number to another.
Allow to have multiple items open
Responsive iframe with different aspect ratios.
Modal window to show content elements, that opens when the page is loaded, with or without a delay, each time or once per session.
Text for the button to close it
Show the X button to close it
Force the user to close it only by clicking in the X or the close button
If 0, it opens once the page is loaded
Close it in n seconds after it has been opened
If 0, user has to close it
Show the modal window only once per user session
Paginator of pages of the same level.
‹ Previous page title - Next page title ›
Show only in first level of sub-pages
Fancy horizontal and vertical progress bars.
Before/after image slider to compare two images interactively.
First image before, second image after. Both should have the same dimensions or at least the same aspect ratio.
Second image a PNG to be used as a mask. It has to have a transparent or semi-transparent area. Black indicates fully transparent.
Buttons of the most common social platforms.
Share page in the most common social platforms.
Container of content elements to be shown in tabs.
Make the tabs fill the 100% of the available width
Icon from the Font Awesome icon set
Search box for the TYPO3 indexed search engine.
Page that contains the search results
A chart that can be bars, lines, doughnut or pie.
File from where to import the data
Table to show pricing options or packages available for a product or service.
Text to add after the price
Box to showcase key marketing messages.
If empty: "Thank you for your participation!"
If empty: "Sorry, you can't participate more than once".
Sorry, you can't participate more than once.
